data.name: Admin.Logout.Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to logout?

data.name: Xncf.ModuleNotInstalled
data.value: The current module is not installed.

data.name: Xncf.InvalidModuleState
data.value: The current module state is [{0}]. Only modules in the [Open] state can execute this action.\r\nIf you force this action, the system will still execute against an unverified assembly because the version you installed earlier may already have been overwritten by a newer build.

data.name: Xncf.FunctionSingleParameterOnly
data.value: FunctionRender methods may only declare one input parameter.

data.name: Xncf.LogFileNotFoundOrDownloaded
data.value: The log file does not exist or has already been downloaded.

data.name: Xncf.ModuleMissingOrNotLoaded
data.value: Module is missing or not loaded ({0}).

data.name: Xncf.FunctionLoadError
data.value: Error loading {0}. Check the logs. If you just added a database migration, complete the module upgrade first.

data.name: Xncf.Install.PublishModeEnabled
data.value: Publish mode is enabled, so this action is unavailable.

data.name: Xncf.Install.ModuleNotFound
data.value: The target module was not found and cannot be installed.

data.name: Admin.Register.Description
data.value: This is the admin backend module used for self-management of the NCF system backend. Do not remove this module. If you really must, back up your data first.

data.name: AdminChat.SessionNotFoundOrForbidden
data.value: Session does not exist or access is denied

data.name: AdminChat.SessionNotFoundOrNoDeletePermission
data.value: Session does not exist or cannot be deleted

data.name: AdminChat.SelectAtLeastOneMessage
data.value: Please select at least one message

data.name: Menu.Db.更新 NeuChar 云账户信息
Menu.Db.使用 https://www.neuchar.com/Developer/Developer 页面中提供的 AppKey、Secret 信息，绑定 NeuChar 云账号，激活更多高级功能
data.value: Use the AppKey and Secret from the NeuChar developer page to bind your cloud account and unlock advanced features.

data.name: Menu.Db.测试当前缓存类型及分布式锁
data.value: Test current cache type and distributed lock

data.name: Menu.Db.查看 XNCF 模型的 Function 状态
Menu.Db.查看当前 XNCF 的 Function 载入情况
data.value: View how Functions are loaded for the current XNCF module

data.name: Menu.Db.安装并开放 XNCF 模块
Menu.Db.安装指定 XNCF 模块，并将模块状态切换为【开放】
data.value: Install the specified XNCF module and set its state to Open

data.name: Menu.Db.安装并开放 XNCF 模块（AI兼容）
data.value: Install and open XNCF module (AI compatible)

data.name: Menu.Db.AI 直接传入模块 UID 或名称关键字即可安装并开放模块，无需 SelectionList 结构
data.value: Install and open a module by UID or name keyword without SelectionList (AI-friendly)

data.name: Menu.Db.获取全部 XNCF 模块信息
Menu.Db.获取系统中全部 XNCF 模块名称和描述（含状态）
data.value: Get all XNCF module names and descriptions (including state)

data.name: AdminUserInfo.UsernameWarning
data.value: Changing the username is not recommended!

data.name: AdminUserInfo.确认删除
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

data.name: Chat.NoMenuAndFunctions
data.value: No menus or functions available for this module

data.name: Dashboard.AIAssistant.InputPlaceholder
data.value:
Enter your question, e.g.: How to configure system parameters?
Tip: Press Ctrl+Enter or Cmd+Enter to send

data.name: Js.buttonTypeRequired
data.value: This field is required when type is Button

data.name: Js.confirmDeleteNMessages
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {0} message(s)? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Js.confirmDeleteSession
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this session?

data.name: Js.createSessionFailedRetry
data.value: Failed to create session, please try again

data.name: Js.enableExtModuleConfirm
data.value: After enabling [Extension Module] management, all extension modules will be displayed under the [Extension Module] submenu. Are you sure?

data.name: Js.hideExtModuleConfirm
data.value: After hiding [Extension Module] management, all extension modules will be shown as top-level menu items. To re-enable, visit this page [/Admin/XncfModule] directly. Are you sure?

data.name: Js.loadModuleListFailed
data.value: Failed to load module list, please try again

data.name: Js.noPermission
data.value: You do not have access permission

data.name: Js.pleaseEnterSourcePath
data.value: Please enter the source code physical path

data.name: Js.pleaseSelectOrCreateSession
data.value: Please select or create a session

data.name: Js.receivedUrlClickBelow
data.value:
Received a URL, click below to open
(This link is provided by a third party, please be careful):

data.name: Js.sendMessageFailedRetry
data.value: Failed to send message, please try again

data.name: Js.sessionExpired
data.value: Session expired, redirecting to login page

data.name: Js.switchToPublishMode
data.value: Switch to publish mode, hide [Extension Module] management unit

data.name: Dashboard.AIAssistant.Subtitle
data.value: Ask me anything to manage your system efficiently

data.name: Dashboard.AIAssistant.EmptyModuleTip
data.value: Click Add Reference Module to select modules as context

data.name: Tenant.ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this tenant?

data.name: Tenant.SaveInfoWarning
data.value: Please save the following information. It will not be available after closing!

data.name: Xncf.ConfirmDeleteModule
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this module?

data.name: Xncf.DisabledModuleWarning
data.value: Module is disabled, please enable it first

data.name: Xncf.UIModuleTip
data.value: This module provides a UI page, accessible from the home page

data.name: Menu.Db.运行 RazorPage 等页面的基础模块
data.value: Base module for running RazorPage and other pages

data.name: Menu.Db.这是系统服务核心模块，主管基础数据结构和网站核心运行数据，请勿删除此模块。如果你实在忍不住，请务必做好数据备份。
data.value: Core system service module managing data structures and runtime data. Do not delete. Please back up data first.

data.name: Menu.Db.多租户模块，这是系统服务核心模块，请勿删除此模块。如果你实在忍不住，请务必做好数据备份。
data.value: Multi-tenant module. Core system service, do not delete. Please back up data first.

data.name: Menu.Db.这是管理员后台模块，用于 NCF 系统后台的自我管理，请勿删除此模块。如果你实在忍不住，请务必做好数据备份。
data.value: Admin backend module for NCF system self-management. Do not delete. Please back up data first.

data.name: Menu.Db.NCF 初始化安装模块，安装完成后可卸载或移除
data.value: NCF initialization installer module. Can be uninstalled after setup.

data.name: Menu.Db.AI 核心模块，基于 Senparc.AI 为所有 AI 项目提供基础能力
data.value: AI core module providing foundational capabilities for all AI projects based on Senparc.AI

data.name: Menu.Db.人工智能代理枢纽模块
Menu.Db.动态数据基础模块，用于创建和管理动态数据（早期迭代，尚未正式发布）
data.value: Dynamic data module for creating and managing dynamic data (early iteration)

data.name: Menu.Db.此模块提供给开发者一个可以直接使用终端命令控制系统的模块！
data.value: Terminal module for developers to control the system via command line

data.name: Menu.Db.此模块提供给开发者在安装完 NCF、发布产品之前，全局修改命名空间，请在生产环境中谨慎使用，此操作不可逆！必须做好提前备份！不建议在已经部署至生产环境并开始运行后使用此功能！
data.value: Global namespace changer. Use with caution before production deployment. Irreversible operation, backup required!

data.name: Menu.Db.此模块提供给开发者一个可以启动任何程序！
data.value: Module for developers to launch any program

data.name: Menu.Db.此模块为其他模块提供Dapr相关功能
data.value: Provides Dapr-related functionality for other modules
